rationale.R1.2: The agent identified multiple consistency issues and proposed thorough repairs, addressing the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.R1.3: Audited every load-bearing claim against evidence, ensuring alignment and suggesting necessary methodology additions.
rationale.RX.1: Marked confidence for each recommendation and disclosed missing evidence effectively.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed exactly within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content; identified potential biases preventing harm.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites traced but minor edits lacked annotation, falling short of full traceability.
